business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Supplemental application only; no coverage limits or requested limits shown. Policy number listed as WC-HCHP-2025-3350.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 Travelers Companies premium 686236.25 with 11 claims and no cancellations; 2023 Markel Corporation premium 619820.26 with 3 claims and no cancellations; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group premium 607294.45 with 6 claims and cancellation noted as Yes.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. Years in business: 16. Years with current management: 16. Full-time employees: 285. Part-time employees: 165. Annual revenue/gross receipts: $42,000,000. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: Yes. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises: Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring: Yes. Material Safety Data Sheets maintained: Yes. Quality control/quality assurance program: No. OSHA citations in past 3 years: Yes. Cyber liability protections in place: No.

concerns: Short-term rentals less than 1 year are permitted.
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities are present.
Plumbing and electrical systems are original from 2005; HVAC replaced in 2020.
Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R.
OSHA citations reported in the past 3 years.
No cyber liability protections in place.
Prior insurance history shows 20 claims across 2022-2024 and a cancellation in 2022.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history shows 20 total claims for 2022-2024: 11 claims in 2024 with Travelers Companies, 3 claims in 2023 with Markel Corporation, and 6 claims in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group. Cancellations were reported as No for 2024 and 2023, and Yes for 2022.
positives: 16 years in business and 16 years with current management.
Written contracts with subcontractors and indemnification required from all contractors.
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring.
Material Safety Data Sheets are maintained.
All listed premises show sprinklered as Yes in the premises schedule.
